author: Felix Fuhs
name: BigramHash Upper Enrichment on 1xH100
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 submission: additive 12,288-bucket BigramHash injected at layer 1, with a tokenizer-derived uppercase bit folded into the hash address. Single-seed post-quant val_bpb 1.31321205 under the 16MB artifact cap. The sweep documents positive results for simple hash-address enrichment and negative results for count init, multi-inject, skip-bigram, trigram hashing, byte features, and higher LR.
technique_summary: Stock 9L/512d/1024-vocab baseline plus additive BigramHash table_size=12288, inject_layer=1, hash_dim=128, HASH_ENRICH=upper.
notes: Single-seed non-record result. Not run on 8xH100 SXM and not statistically significant for the official leaderboard.
